data.title: Futures market traders expect the Federal Reserve to cut interest rates again in December
data.description: Federal Reserve Chairman Powell previously said there were dangers in delaying action, which foreshadowed a rate cut at the Fed's next meeting on October 29. His remarks were seen as solidifying expectations of a 25 basis point rate cut this month. Traders in the futures market had anticipated this and were convinced there would be another rate cut in December. If they are right, this would be in line with the median forecast made by Fed officials last month. The hawkish arguments were strong enough to convince eight of the 19 Fed officials to predict there would be no further rate cuts next year. Many believe that consumer prices face the ongoing threat of tariffs, a point highlighted once again by the latest trade frictions. (Jinshi)

data.title: Binance Futures to Launch LABUSDT and RIVERUSDT U-margined Perpetual Contracts
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance Futures will launch LABUSDT and RIVERUSDT U-margined perpetual contracts. October 17, 2025, 10:30 PM (GMT+8): LABUSDT perpetual contracts with a maximum leverage of 50x. October 17, 2025, 10:45 PM (GMT+8): RIVERUSDT perpetual contracts with a maximum leverage of 50x.

data.title: Glassnode: Macro uncertainty continues to drag down Bitcoin, the market is cautious but not one-sided
data.description: Glassnode published an analysis stating that macroeconomic uncertainty continues to weigh on Bitcoin's performance. Gold outperformed Bitcoin by over 20% over the past week, partially eroding its "store of value" status. The options market indicated a significant shift in investor sentiment, with Bitcoin's short-term volatility soaring to 50, with traders paying a premium for immediate protection. The market structure favored a defensive stance, with strong demand for put options, and the cost of downside protection exceeding the cost of upside exposure. Despite this, fund flows remained relatively balanced, with some accounts reducing protective positions, some investors taking advantage of the dip to sell volatility, and others selectively buying cheap call options, indicating a cautious but not one-sided market.

data.title: Nasdaq-listed CDT Equity spent $1 million to increase its holdings by approximately 9.25 Bitcoins
data.description: Nasdaq-listed CDT Equity announced it has spent $1,005,000 to acquire 9.25648743 bitcoins at an average purchase price of $108,301.75. As of now, the company's total bitcoin holdings have reached 17.9090111 bitcoins. The company plans to continue to advance its cryptocurrency reserve strategy. (Globenewswire)

data.title: U.S. Unemployment Claims Decline Amid Government Shutdown
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the number of initial unemployment claims in the United States decreased last week during the government shutdown. Analysis by Bloomberg indicates that for the week ending October 11, approximately 215,000 claims were filed, down from the previous week's estimate of 234,000. Despite the shutdown, the U.S. Department of Labor has not released weekly unemployment reports since September 25 but has provided downloadable data for most states. The estimates were adjusted using the Bureau of Labor Statistics' pre-published weekly seasonal adjustment factors, aligning closely with official data when all state data is complete. However, recent weekly data for Arizona, Massachusetts, Nevada, and Tennessee were missing and replaced with the average of the previous four weeks. Calculations show that for the week ending October 4, continuing claims slightly increased to 1.93 million, up from the previous week's estimate of 1.92 million.

data.title: Arthur Hayes seeks $250 million to launch private equity firm
data.description: According to market news: Arthur Hayes is seeking to raise $250 million to establish a private equity firm with the goal of acquiring small and medium-sized cryptocurrency companies.

data.title: Spot gold fell below $4,300 an ounce, down 0.7% on the day.
data.description: Spot gold fell below $4,300 per ounce, down 0.7% on the day. Dow Jones and S&P 500 futures both turned positive, while Nasdaq futures fell 0.1%. (Jinshi)

data.description: According to BitcoinTreasuries monitoring, Prenetics, a US-listed company, disclosed that it has increased its holdings by 8.6 BTC, bringing its total Bitcoin holdings to 264.

data.description: According to an official announcement, Binance will add ZEROBASE (ZBT) to its SimpleEarn flexible product, coin purchase, flash swap, and margin trading services at 1:00 PM (UTC) on October 17, 2025. ZBT will be available as a borrowable asset for cross-margin and isolated margin trading, with ZBT/USDT and ZBT/USDC trading pairs available. (This newsletter was generated with AI assistance.)

data.title: CDT Equity Increases Bitcoin Holdings with Recent Purchase
data.description: According to BlockBeats, CDT Equity, a publicly traded company on the U.S. stock market, has announced an increase in its Bitcoin holdings. The company acquired approximately 9.25 Bitcoins at an average purchase price of $108,301.75 each. This acquisition brings CDT Equity's total Bitcoin holdings to approximately 17.9 Bitcoins.

data.title: A whale withdrew 20.8 million USDT from Aster and transferred it to Hyperliquid, and then purchased 143.98 BTC.
data.description: According to MLM monitoring, the whale who sold 5.07 million HYPE tokens three weeks ago and transferred part of them to Aster withdrew 2,080 USDT from Aster and transferred it to Hyperliquid in the past few hours, and then purchased 143.98 BTC (worth $16.7 million).

data.title: The value of Gate Alpha's 74th ZBT airdrop has reached $260
data.description: According to official news, Gate Alpha will launch its 74th ZBT airdrop at 9:00 PM (UTC+8) tonight, with the highest airdrop value reaching $260. ZBT's price has reportedly risen to $1 since its launch. Gate Alpha currently supports public chains including SOL, ETH, BNB Chain, Base, SUI, ARB, World Chain, AVAX, POLY, LINEA, ZK, and OP.

data.title: OpenSea is transforming into a crypto trading aggregator, with crypto trading volume reaching $1.6 billion so far in October.
data.description: OpenSea is undergoing a difficult transformation, expanding from an NFT business to a one-stop trading platform for all cryptocurrencies on 22 different blockchains. Data shows that in the first two weeks of October 2025, OpenSea facilitated $1.6 billion worth of cryptocurrency transactions and $230 million worth of NFT transactions, far higher than the total trading volume of $142 million in May. This growth will make October 2025 the largest month in terms of trading volume in more than three years. Under OpenSea's new plan, it integrates buy and sell orders from decentralized cryptocurrency exchanges such as Uniswap and Meteora. In terms of fees, OpenSea charges a fee of approximately 0.9% for each transaction, generating $16 million in revenue in the past two weeks. (Forbes)

data.title: Tether officially opens source wallet development kit WDK
data.description: According to official news, Tether announced the official open source wallet development kit WDK, a new development toolkit designed to enable humans, machines and artificial intelligence agents to build, deploy and use secure, multi-chain, self-hosted wallets that can be integrated into any device, from embedded systems to mobile, desktop or server operating systems.

data.title: FIFA World Cup NFT platform faces criminal complaint from Swiss regulator
data.description: Swiss regulator GESPA has filed a criminal complaint with prosecutors, alleging that the FIFA World Cup NFT platform violated national gambling laws. The investigation revealed that the FIFA Collect platform provided an unlicensed gambling service in Switzerland, where participants paid money and could win prizes through a random draw, constituting an illegal operation. FIFA did not immediately respond to a request for comment on the incident. (The Block)

data.title: Binance Wallet ZBT Booster Season 1 Rewards Now Available
data.description: Binance Wallet announced on the X platform that the first season of the ZEROBASE (ZBT) Booster event is now open for redemption, with a total of 20 million ZBT rewards.

data.title: USDD Smart Allocator’s cumulative revenue has exceeded US$5 million
data.description: The decentralized stablecoin USDD has officially announced that its Smart Allocator mechanism has generated over $5 million in real returns. Smart Allocator is a yield-generating strategy for USDD that intelligently allocates protocol reserve assets to DeFi platforms like Aave and JustLend, enabling sustainable yield generation. Currently, USDD has a TVL exceeding $550 million and has been deployed on major public chains such as TRON and Ethereum.

data.title: White House economic adviser Hassett: The expected three rate cuts are just the beginning
data.description: White House economic adviser Hassett said the Fed's three interest rate cuts are only the beginning, and that banks currently have ample reserves, so there's no reason they can't continue to maintain a 4% growth rate. (Jinshi)
